headline: This Is Why Wall Street Firms Are Bullish on Utility Play PPL Corporation (PPL)
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) is one of the top utility stocks to buy now. On April 13, Jefferies analysts reiterated their Buy rating on PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) and raised the stock’s price target to $48 from $40. The bullishness underscores the research firm’s confidence of a potential positive settlement in a rate case in Pennsylvania. In […]

headline: PPL Corporation to Conduct Webcast on First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) will release consolidated first-quarter 2026 earnings results on Friday, May 8.
